scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/client.ts src/skills/skill-manager.ts src/mcp/index.ts --format esm --dts
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/client.ts src/skills/skill-manager.ts src/mcp/index.ts --format esm --dts --watch
scripts.test: bash -lc 'shopt -s globstar nullglob; tests=(src/**/*.test.ts); if [ ${#tests[@]} -eq 0 ]; then echo "No test files found."; exit 0; fi; node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-force-exit "${tests[@]}"'
